description: Jarvis Skills Library index — multi-agent framework for Poseidon V6. Each agent file lives at data/jarvis-skills/<domain>.json.

domains.summary: OBBBA provisions, federal/state tax, filing calendar, entity tax treatments, deductions.

J-1 partner contract terms, placement margins, source country rules, DS-2019 timeline, housing requirements. REFERENCE ONLY — operational J-1 data lives on the J1 System Dashboard per the strict partition rule.
domains.partitionWarning: Operational J-1 data (active candidates, orders, housing matches) lives on j1-system-dashboard.html. This panel is reference contract/policy knowledge for Jarvis.

domains.summary: MLC/cruise line regulations, position categories, wage scales, daily pulse rules, crew placement timeline.
domains.partitionWarning: Strict partition: no J-1 cross-contamination. Cruise candidates/contracts only.

domains.summary: CTI brand voice, campaign templates, content calendar, partnership positioning, competitive intel, podcast format.
Org structure, SOPs, Zoho One config, dashboard refresh protocols, document conventions, escalation paths.
LinkedIn-style platform architecture, AI avatar standards, job matching algorithm, geographic focus, profile standards.

globalEscalationRules.action: Halt — flag for Robert (CEO) approval before any agent commits.

globalEscalationRules.trigger: Partner contract amendment, renewal, or termination
globalEscalationRules.action: Halt — flag for Robert (CEO) approval. Agents may draft, never sign.

globalEscalationRules.trigger: Compliance flag (sanctions, OFAC, immigration violation, MLC breach)
globalEscalationRules.action: Halt immediately — flag for legal review. Do not proceed.
Halt — strict partition rule violation. Confirm with Robert before any cross-data action.

globalEscalationRules.trigger: Customer-facing communication (email, post, message) sent on Robert's behalf
globalEscalationRules.action: Draft only — never send. Surface draft for Robert's review.
